title: Fix DPI import of null C-string

features.name: dpi-c string function import
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C import declaration for a function that returns a string type
features.snippet: import "DPI-C" function string getenvval(input string env_name);

features.name: string variable assigned from dpi function call
features.description: Code should include a string variable initialized by calling a DPI-C imported function that may return null
